query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS restaurants (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  slug VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  name VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
  shortName VARCHAR(64),
  description TEXT,
  culturalNote TEXT,
  operatingSince VARCHAR(32),
  tier ENUM('hawker-legend','premium-local','fine-dining','chain','mamak','kopitiam') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'hawker-legend',
  awards JSON,
  region ENUM('singapore','penang','kl','malacca','johor','malaysia') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'singapore',
  area VARCHAR(256),
  ethnic JSON,
  occasions JSON,
  dietary JSON,
  website VARCHAR(512),
  michelinNote TEXT,
  coverImageUrl VARCHAR(512),
  iconUrl VARCHAR(512),
  status ENUM('pending','approved','rejected','draft') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  submittedBy INT,
  reviewedBy INT,
  reviewNote TEXT,
  submittedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  reviewedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
